title: lastrea jessoensis
intro: Lastrea jessoensis, also known as Jesso's lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Lastrea jessoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, thus providing health benefits such as relief from arthritis, respiratory problems, and menstrual disorders. Herbal preparations of Lastrea jessoensis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
